overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link running through a shallow wetland meadow with lily pads, surrounded by scattered trees and distant mountains under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow wetland meadow with scattered deciduous trees

agents.ego_description: Link is running steadily through the shallow water toward the distant mountains, passing by white flowers and trees.

entered.detail: Tall tree with bright green foliage that the character passes by
Distinctive natural rock arch formation on the distant mountain ridge
Shallow water covering the ground with floating lily pads and aquatic plants
Tall thin tower structure visible on the distant horizon
Cluster of white flowers growing in the shallow water on the left side
Large boulder formation emerging on the left side of the field

segments.scene_description: The character Link runs continuously through a shallow wetland area covered in lily pads, heading toward distant mountains. The camera follows from behind in third-person perspective as he passes a tall deciduous tree on the left and approaches a large rock formation, with a distinctive mountain arch visible in the background throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shallow wetland meadow that leads toward a distant mountain range. It begins with the character Link running through a water-covered expanse dotted with lily pads, with the camera tracking from behind. As he advances, the perspective glides past a tall deciduous tree on the left, maintaining a steady focus on the horizon. The scene then shifts as he approaches a large rock formation, all while a distinctive mountain arch remains visible in the background under a clear sky.
